revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十二]][[zh:十二月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 12|qq=December 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Jiajing|ja|嘉靖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiajing|1=Jiajing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1055677}} 34th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|qid=Q6590|lt=1556 AD|1=1556}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}} ) – The {{ill|Huaxian Earthquake|ja|華県Earthquake|1=1556 Shaanxi earthquake|2=ja|3=華県地震|lt=Huaxian Earthquake|qid=Q191293|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Huaxian Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q191293}} : an earthquake struck the {{ill|Shaanxi|en|Shaanxi|qid=Q47974|lt=Shaanxi Province|1=Shaanxi}} of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|qid=Q9903|lt=Ming Dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} , resulting in a death toll of 830,000 – the highest in history. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 14th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1610|en|1610|qid=Q6765|lt=1610 AD|1=1610}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|qid=Q2221|lt=January 6|1=January 6}} ) – The {{ill|Okamoto Daihachi incident|en|Okamoto Daihachi incident|qid=Q1223487|lt=Okamoto Daihachi Incident|1=Okamoto Daihachi incident}} : {{ill|Arima Harunobu|en|Arima Harunobu|qid=Q1197394|lt=Harunobu Arima|1=Arima Harunobu}} burned the Portuguese ship {{ill|Madre de Deus|ja|マードレ・デ・デウス号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Madre de Deus|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491582|1=Madre de Deus}} , which had entered {{ill|Nagasaki (disambiguation)|en|Nagasaki (disambiguation)|qid=Q294167|lt=Nagasaki|1=Nagasaki (disambiguation)}} , in retaliation for the previous year’s burning of a {{ill|Red Seal ships|en|Red Seal ships|qid=Q1429347|lt=shuinsen|1=Red Seal ships}} in {{ill|Macau|en|Macau|qid=Q14773|lt=Macau|1=Macau}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863 AD|1=1863}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}} ) – The {{ill|British Legation Arson Incident|ja|英国公使館焼き討ち事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/British Legation Arson Incident|1=Q11616904|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11616904}} : {{ill|Takasugi Shinsaku|en|Takasugi Shinsaku|qid=Q700310|lt=Shinsaku Takasugi|1=Takasugi Shinsaku}} and others burned the British legation under construction in {{ill|Shinagawa (disambiguation)|en|Shinagawa (disambiguation)|qid=Q4419994|lt=Shinagawa|1=Shinagawa (disambiguation)}} . == Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1272|en|1272|qid=Q5524|lt=1272 AD|1=1272}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Sadatoki|en|Hōjō Sadatoki|qid=Q3136681|lt=Tadahisa Hōjō|1=Hōjō Sadatoki}} , the 9th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} (d. {{ill|1311|en|1311|qid=Q5731|lt=1311 AD|1=1311}} ). * {{ill|Enbun|ja|Enbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enbun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd Year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 13th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1359|en|1359|qid=Q6143|lt=1359 AD|1=1359}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-En'yū|en|Emperor Go-En'yū|qid=Q471799|lt=Emperor Go-En'yū|1=Emperor Go-En'yū}} , the 5th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} of the Northern Court (d. {{ill|1393|en|1393|qid=Q6390|lt=1393 AD|1=1393}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835 AD|1=1835}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}} ) – {{ill|Yukichi Fukuzawa|ja|福沢諭吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukichi Fukuzawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 福澤諭吉|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 福澤諭吉|1=Fukuzawa Yukichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q355447}} , a {{ill|thinker|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thinker|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24885626}} and founder of {{ill|Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)|en|Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)|qid=Q6420636|lt=Keio University|1=Keio Gijuku (Gakkō Hōjin)}} (d. {{ill|1901|en|1901|qid=Q2035|lt=1901 AD|1=1901}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 4th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|AD 999|en|AD 999|qid=Q18453|lt=999 AD|1=AD 999}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|qid=Q2151|lt=January 2|1=January 2}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Sanekata|en|Fujiwara no Sanekata|qid=Q1059336|lt=Fujiwara no Saneyuki|1=Fujiwara no Sanekata}} , a {{ill|poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/poet|1=Waka poet|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11122954}} (birth year unknown).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|11|12|13|11|12|1|12|1212|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
